subsystems.ENGINE: 4.0L Water-Cooled Flat-6 Boxer. Dry-sump lubrication. 8400 RPM Redline.
subsystems.TRANSMISSION: Porsche 6-speed sequential dog-type. Pneumatic paddle shift.
subsystems.SUSPENSION: Front: Double wishbone axle. Rear: Multi-link axle. Adjustable camber/toe.
subsystems.ELECTRONICS: Bosch MS 6.6 ECU. Cosworth ICD Color Display. Traction Control (TC).
